[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001111111 7
1 111101111 8
2 010111010 5
3 000110010 3
4 001100010 3
5 001111111 7
6 111101111 8
7 101101010 5

01 10 111110100 6
12 21 100110110 5
23 32 101111111 8
34 43 111111111 a
45 54 111101111 8 match 1 6
56 65 101101110 6
67 76 101100110 5
70 07 111110000 5

02 20 111010010 5
13 31 001111111 7 match 0 5
24 42 111101111 8 match 1 6
35 53 101111111 8
46 64 111101111 8 match 1 6
57 75 101101010 5 match 7
60 06 111010110 6
71 17 101110100 5

03 30 111111111 a
14 41 111111111 a
25 52 101101010 5 match 7
36 63 001111111 7 match 0 5
47 74 111101111 8 match 1 6
50 05 111111010 7
61 16 000110110 4
72 27 101100010 4

04 40 111111111 a
15 51 101111110 7
26 62 100000110 3
37 73 101111111 8
